summary: Backend API testing completed for Scambio di Favori app. All 33 tests passed covering Chat API, Money Filter, Social Debt, Auth, and Favor endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: Social debt logic verified: in_debt=true when granelli<0, can_request=false when granelli<=-3 (DEBT_LIMIT)
Money filter regex patterns work correctly for euro, contanti, pagamento, bonifico, iban, paypal, etc.
Chat messages correctly require favor participation (403 for non-participants)
Location privacy working: exact_latitude/longitude hidden, approximate_latitude/longitude returned
seed_data_creation: Test users created with TEST_ prefix during test execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests comprehensive for chat, money filter, and social debt. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_chat_and_debt.py covers 33 test cases. Existing test favor_id favor_4c82a66dd3bb is in 'accepted' status and can be used for chat testing. User Anna Debitrice has creator_in_debt=true on her favors.
